hero.description: Where ancient Ethiopian Orthodox Tewahedo traditions meet the digital age to connect our global community effortlessly. Access resources, stay informed, and engage spiritually inside this sanctuary.

topic_cards.topic_1_title: Read helpful words from the fathers and get spiritual strength
topic_cards.topic_1_desc: Read helpful words from the fathers and get spiritual strength in all situations through discovering the textual messages on our digital app.
topic_cards.topic_2_title: Hear the path of the soul through giving in spiritual media with Gibi Gubaie
topic_cards.topic_2_desc: Hear insightful voices on faith and giving throughout the year uncovering higher meanings from those dedicated to spiritual causes.
topic_cards.topic_3_title: Finding the Truth: Common Questions and Answers in the Orthodox Church
topic_cards.topic_3_desc: Find deeply helpful guidance and resources specifically to answer and discover deeper faith here.

join.join_desc: We invite you to partner with us in our membership program. Through this, we continue ensuring the legacy of faith is handed down.
join.see_what: See what Association Membership can do for you

highlight.quote: "The joy of giving is the meaning the true peace of spirit. Our small act helps many in new habits and create new lives."
highlight.author: — H.E. Abune Petros
highlight.desc: Through Mary's Joy, find meaning through the giving to our community activities, discovering that joy starts with a spiritually healthy approach to life.

footer.quote_taste: "Taste & See that the LORD is Good"
